input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.2.3
            TITLE: the hot (ungrounded) terminal must be insulated.

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.2.3: The hot (ungrounded) terminal must be insulated.
T.9.2.3 The hot (ungrounded) terminal must be insulated.

final_answer: The hot (ungrounded) terminal must be insulated.
